  3. Optimizing Core Web Vitals in Next.js

Optimizing Core Web Vitals in Next.js

۱۴۰۳/۱۰/۲۶

Practical techniques to improve LCP, CLS, and INP in production Next.js apps.

Focus on image optimization, critical CSS, and hydration strategies. Use next/image, preload fonts, and split third-party scripts.
